title: Notice Pipeline Workshop: Repair, Trace, and Verify
summary: Take over one cumulative notice artifact while prompts fade: organize it, trace both load paths, inspect browser recovery, and verify a durable repair.
objectives: Coordinate all foundation competencies while support fades.
Preserve earlier correct work while diagnosing and verifying a changed defect.

steps.title: Interpret the trace · repair-clinic notice
steps.instruction: In the partially working repair-clinic notice, what does the read event establish?
steps.why: Separating system responsibilities makes a visible symptom traceable to the layer that can cause it. Working through interpret the trace narrows the partially working repair-clinic notice as you connect the explanation to evidence.

content.text: A web page is an outcome of cooperation. Input hardware reports an action; the operating system coordinates storage, memory, processes, and devices; the browser parses document data; graphics work prepares output; and the display emits pixels. The HTML file is data, not a self-running application. Apply this distinction during the partially working repair-clinic notice read task.

hints: During partially working repair-clinic notice read, identify which system chain boundary “Interpret the trace” asks about.
Compare every partially working repair-clinic notice option with the named “Interpret the trace” evidence during read.
For partially working repair-clinic notice read, reject claims that skip a required layer or invent unavailable evidence for “Interpret the trace.”

options.text: The browser permanently rewrote the file as soon as the pointer was clicked.
The operating system supplied stored document bytes before browser parsing began.
The display requested HTML tags directly from storage.

steps.title: Transfer Check letter case with new evidence · repair-clinic notice
steps.instruction: Using the new evidence in the partially working repair-clinic notice transfer round, source requests Images/Map.svg, while the tree contains images/map.svg. What is the durable repair?

content.text: A project is a directory tree. A filename includes its real extension, and a relative path describes one resource from the current document location. Keeping related resources inside the project and testing after moving the whole folder exposes machine-specific absolute paths and case mismatches. Apply this distinction during the partially working repair-clinic notice transfer round read task.

Internet and web are exact synonyms with no useful distinction.
